title: Infinities
content:
{{Top|inf|real}}
[[File:InfinitiesLogo.png|right]]
'''Infinities''' is a term referring to [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] stories that do not apply to the Legends continuity timeline. These stories were often written as parodies or presented "what-if" circumstances and were therefore officially considered [[Canon|non-canonical]] within the Legends continuity.

==Infinities==
